name: send_scheduler_link
description: When the caller declines an immediate transfer but agrees to schedule for later, ask whether they prefer text or email, then call this tool with channel ('sms' or 'email') and destination (their phone or email). Returns ok=true on success. If the response is ok=false with reason='email_provider_missing', tell the caller you'll text instead and call this tool again with channel='sms'.

destination.description: Phone (E.164, e.g. +14155551234) for SMS or email address for email.
